morrik.name: Morrik
morrik.title: the Battle-Father
morrik.answer: Your sword-arm tingles with borrowed strength.
morrik.omen: Ravens circle the walls sunwise — Morrik watches a warrior.

solara.name: Solara
solara.title: the Golden Mother
solara.answer: Warmth floods through you like noon sun.
solara.omen: The dawn came gold as ripe wheat — Solara smiles on the fields.

veyra.name: Veyra
veyra.title: the Way-Warden
veyra.answer: The road ahead feels suddenly familiar.
veyra.omen: Milestones on the east road were found garlanded — Veyra has passed.

grimble.name: Grimble
grimble.title: the Ledger-Keeper
grimble.answer: Something clinks in your purse that was not there before.
grimble.omen: Every scale in the market weighed true today — Grimble is pleased.

pale_lady.name: The Pale Lady
pale_lady.title: the Last Mercy
pale_lady.answer: A cool hand seems to rest on your brow, and the pain goes.
pale_lady.omen: No one in the village died this week — the Pale Lady stayed her hand.
